request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Hybrid threats are evolving faster than our laws. Last year, a coordinated disinformation campaign nearly destabilized a key ally's election. We need proactive security powers to preempt these attacks before they reach our borders. Civil liberties protections are important, but in an era of hybrid warfare, waiting for perfect solutions leaves us vulnerable. #NationalSecurityFirst
